title: Chocco's Cozy Campers
description: This mod adds a new biome, animals and food.
body:
This mod adds new mobs like Badgers, bears, deer and more
![Badger's eating berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b51d7f27be3edf777cf2f7ed6dbdf310ffcefc22.png)

It also adds two new biomes, Fir forest and Maple forest
![Bears out and about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d61fcb4aa698d546504811d3f96ff3809533a2bf_0.webp)

It also adds new foods based on camping

[Curseforge download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/choccos-cozy-campers)

[Join my discord](https://discord.gg/qGjsDBdNzn)
